mapper.select:
SELECT c.id as id, c.channel_code as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, c.customer_type as customerType, c.channel_addr as channelAddr, IFNULL(s.site_code, '') AS siteCode, si.site_name as siteName, c.status as status, c.updated_time as updatedTime, c.updater_name as updaterName FROM customer_channel c left join site_customer s on c.channel_code = s.channel_code left join site_info si on s.site_code = si.site_code WHERE 1 = 1
and c.channel_code like concat ('%', #{requestVO.channelCode},'%')
and c.channel_name like concat ('%', #{requestVO.channelName},'%')
and c.status = #{requestVO.status}
ORDER BY c.created_time desc

select t1.site_code as siteCode, t2.channel_addr AS channelAddr , t2.channel_code AS channelCode , t2.channel_name AS channelName, t2.customer_type as customerType , t2.platform_code AS channelCode, t2.remark from site_customer t1 inner join customer_channel t2 on t1.channel_code = t2.channel_code where t1.site_code = #{siteCode} and t1.enable_status = 0 order by t1.updated_time desc limit 1
